top.title: PAAN
top.description: Corporate site of PAAN Co., Ltd. Bridging cultures through food, with the power of technology and artificial intelligence.
top.hero_title: Opening the path to dishes yet undiscovered.
top.hero_sub:
The dishes we wish to taste, the drinks we long for, the aromas we wish to feel, the tables we wish to touch.
The walls of language and culture between them, we shall surmount with technology and artificial intelligence.
top.news_2026_06_03_release: PAAN Co., Ltd. will be founded.
top.news_2026_05_10_info: Our corporate website is now live.
top.news_2026_04_18_story: On the Shinkansen home, returning from a day trip to Iwase, Toyama. The co-founders resolved to establish PAAN Co., Ltd.

mission.title: PAAN
mission.description: Opening the path to dishes yet undiscovered. Restaurants have crossed borders, but dishes have not. Through technology and AI, we bridge cultures through food.
mission.page_title: Opening the path to dishes yet undiscovered.
mission.question_h: Restaurants have crossed borders. But dishes?
mission.question_p1: Michelin, Zagat, Tabelog. ── Information about restaurants, over a century, has crossed borders. And yet — have the dishes themselves crossed?
mission.question_p2: If you cannot read the menu abroad, you will only order what you already know. The wall of "you won't know unless you go" remains, in silence, even after the information revolution. ── Are we truly meeting the dishes we want to eat?
mission.regrets_h: The dining table holds many regrets.
mission.story1_lead: The long-awaited overseas trip — and the very first dinner.
mission.story1_p: You step into a restaurant from the guidebook, gather your courage, open the menu. — You cannot picture what will arrive. In the end, you order something you already know. Then you glance at the next table's plate and realise: "that was what I wanted to eat."
mission.story_coda: — A night spent frozen before more than a hundred dim sum in a Chinese teahouse. A night when the drink you longed for never appeared. A meal slowly given up on, in the face of dietary needs. A restaurateur who, despite welcoming a foreign guest through the noren, cannot guide them properly, and reluctantly sees them leave. These small regrets — these are what we want to take on.
mission.approach_p1: What we confront is the lack of connection between information and people. And the lack of access to the dishes themselves.
mission.approach_p2: Through technology and AI. To make food a way for people and cultures to meet one step more deeply.
mission.first_h: Our first challenge: beyond the menu.
mission.first_p1: PAAN's first product is a service that takes on the beyond of the menu.
mission.first_p2: We dissolve the quiet unease of "I cannot read it" or "I do not understand it" with the power of technology and AI. Not a mere literal translation — but one rooted in the food culture of the user's mother tongue. Beyond translating the dish name: explanations of each dish in its cultural context, illustrative images, ordering suggestions, allergy warnings, even introductions to local specialities. All from a single photo of the menu — instantly.
mission.first_p3: This is the first step of our larger vision. Crossing barriers of language and culture, we open the road to dishes you have yet to discover.

brand.title: PAAN
brand.description: Products by PAAN Co., Ltd. We are preparing a series of scene-specific products to realise encounters — between people, between cultures — through food.
brand.menupaan_tagline: Answering the table's regrets, one scene-specific product at a time.
brand.menupaan_desc: PAAN Co., Ltd. holds a vision of answering the many regrets that remain at the dining table with a series of scene-specific products. Details of our first and subsequent products will be announced when ready.
brand.menupaan_feature_func_value: Dish understanding via AI, culturally contextual translation, scene-specific matching
brand.others_name: PAAN Series, second product and beyond
brand.others_desc: Nights when one finds the drink one longs for. Encounters with the dish that best pairs with the local sake. Nights when one welcomes, without hesitation, the table marked by dietary restriction or conviction. And the welcome that befits the guest who has stepped through our doorway. ── The PAAN Series, realising one by one through products the scenes set out in our mission, will unfold in due course.

company.title: PAAN
company.description: Company information and officers of PAAN Co., Ltd.
company.biz_1_sub: Services bridging cultures through food, for international travellers and inbound visitors to Japan alike
company.biz_2_sub: Stock management, order management, multilingual menus, and other operational support systems
company.biz_3_sub: SaaS selection and implementation guidance, operational design, consultation on digitalisation
company.biz_4_sub: Planning and development of products realising the next generation of dining experiences, alongside research into dish understanding, culturally contextual translation, and scene-specific matching using artificial intelligence
company.founder_inui_bio:
Born in July 1996. Graduated from Keio Senior High School in 2015 and from Keio University, Faculty of Law (Political Science), in 2019. Joined the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan as a career-track officer, serving on the Korea and Philippines desks at headquarters, before being posted to the Embassy of Japan in the United Kingdom as Attaché and later Second Secretary, where he handled economic and diplomatic affairs.

In June 2025, he left the Ministry to take up the position of Managing Director (fourth generation) at Kushinobo Co., Ltd., a kushikatsu specialist restaurant group founded in 1950. His experience as a diplomat and as a restaurateur led to the conception of the Company's business.

Co-founded PAAN Co., Ltd. in June 2026.
company.founder_yui_bio:
Born in July 1996. Graduated from Keio Senior High School in 2015. While at Keio University, Faculty of Law, he passed the preliminary bar examination in 2018 and the bar examination in 2019.

Upon admission to the bar in 2021 (Daini Tokyo Bar Association), he joined the law firm ZeLo, specialising in start-up finance, public affairs and general corporate matters and providing legal advice informed by both private- and public-sector experience. After serving at the Innovation and Environment Bureau (Innovation Creation and New Business Promotion Division) of the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry, he joined Fugen Law Office, where he currently practises.

Co-founded PAAN Co., Ltd. in June 2026.

contact.title: PAAN
contact.description: Contact PAAN Co., Ltd. for partnerships, press, careers, and more.
contact.lead: For business partnerships, press enquiries, careers, and other matters, please reach out via the email address below. We will respond after reviewing your enquiry.
contact.email_note: We aim to respond within three business days (Mon-Fri, excluding public holidays). For urgent matters, or if you do not receive a reply within a reasonable time, we kindly ask you to send your message again.
contact.inquiry_1_body: We welcome partnerships with restaurants, travel and tourism providers, local governments, media, and companies in the translation and AI sectors.
contact.inquiry_2_body: For press, articles, and speaking engagements, please include your outlet, scope, and proposed dates.
contact.inquiry_3_body: We are recruiting engineers, designers, business development, and operations colleagues. Please include a brief background with your enquiry.
contact.inquiry_4_body: For enquiries about our products, please contact us at the email address above.
